import asyncio

cache = {}
locks = {}


async def get_user_data(user_id: str) -> dict:
    if user_id in cache:
        return cache[user_id]
    if user_id not in locks:
        locks[user_id] = asyncio.Lock()
    async with locks[user_id]:
        if user_id in cache:
            return cache[user_id]
        data = await fetch_user_from_db(user_id)
        cache[user_id] = data
        return data


async def get_product_details(product_id: str) -> dict:
    if product_id in cache:
        return cache[product_id]
    if product_id not in locks:
        locks[product_id] = asyncio.Lock()
    async with locks[product_id]:
        if product_id in cache:
            return cache[product_id]
        details = await fetch_product_from_api(product_id)
        cache[product_id] = details
        return details
